2026-04-10T05:45:14.8941631Z ---
2026-04-10T05:45:14.8941835Z 
2026-04-10T05:45:14.8943494Z **Documentation gap identified for `Azure.ResourceManager.DesktopVirtualization`**
2026-04-10T05:45:14.8943913Z 
2026-04-10T05:45:15.7861097Z **Triggered by:** PR #57983 (commit `dd27dd29c`) by @fullpanic
2026-04-10T05:45:15.7861743Z 
2026-04-10T05:45:15.7862230Z **What changed (1.4.0-beta.1):**
2026-04-10T05:45:15.8346871Z - New resource types: `SessionHostConfigurationResource`, `SessionHostManagementResource`, `ActiveSessionHostConfigurationResource`
2026-04-10T05:45:16.9755917Z - New operations: `GetRegistrationTokens`, `GetSingleSessionHostRegistrationTokens` on HostPool; `RetryProvisioning` on SessionHost
2026-04-10T05:45:17.0239844Z - Migrated to TypeSpec-based generation
2026-04-10T05:45:17.0240283Z 
2026-04-10T05:45:17.0240923Z **Gaps found:**
2026-04-10T05:45:18.0428881Z 1. README is a generic boilerplate with no Desktop Virtualization-specific content
2026-04-10T05:45:18.0435459Z 2. "Key concepts" section doesn't describe the AVD domain model (host pools, session hosts, workspaces, etc.)
2026-04-10T05:45:18.0443552Z 3. "Examples" section only links to generic samples — no code snippets for any resources
2026-04-10T05:45:19.3223285Z 4. None of the 3 new resource types have usage examples or documentation
2026-04-10T05:45:20.4257013Z 5. No hand-written sample files exist under `tests/Samples/` (only auto-generated ones, which don't cover new 1.4.0-beta.1 types)
2026-04-10T05:45:20.4258084Z 
2026-04-10T05:45:20.4258915Z **Recommended issue title:** `[DesktopVirtualization] Docs: Document new resources and operations added in 1.4.0-beta.1`
2026-04-10T05:45:20.4259734Z 
2026-04-10T05:45:20.4260193Z The issue should guide a coding agent to:
2026-04-10T05:45:21.6541480Z 1. Update the README with AVD-specific key concepts and code snippet placeholders
2026-04-10T05:45:21.6554260Z 2. Create `tests/Samples/Sample_DesktopVirtualizationOperations.cs` with `#region Snippet:` blocks for the 7 key operations
2026-04-10T05:45:21.8119055Z 3. Run `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 desktopvirtualization` to inject the snippets into the README

2026-04-10T05:45:25.5183319Z   
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5183622Z   **Documentation gap identified for `Azure.ResourceManager.DesktopVirtualization`**
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5184002Z   
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5184224Z   **Triggered by:** PR #57983 (commit `dd27dd29c`) by @fullpanic
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5184507Z   
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5184675Z   **What changed (1.4.0-beta.1):**
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5185231Z   - New resource types: `SessionHostConfigurationResource`, `SessionHostManagementResource`, `ActiveSessionHostConfigurationResource`
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5186633Z   - New operations: `GetRegistrationTokens`, `GetSingleSessionHostRegistrationTokens` on HostPool; `RetryProvisioning` on SessionHost
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5187360Z   - Migrated to TypeSpec-based generation
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5187603Z   
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5187752Z   **Gaps found:**
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5188071Z   1. README is a generic boilerplate with no Desktop Virtualization-specific content
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5188645Z   2. "Key concepts" section doesn't describe the AVD domain model (host pools, session hosts, workspaces, etc.)
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5189307Z   3. "Examples" section only links to generic samples — no code snippets for any resources
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5189771Z   4. None of the 3 new resource types have usage examples or documentation
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5190369Z   5. No hand-written sample files exist under `tests/Samples/` (only auto-generated ones, which don't cover new 1.4.0-beta.1 types)
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5190853Z   
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5191262Z   **Recommended issue title:** `[DesktopVirtualization] Docs: Document new resources and operations added in 1.4.0-beta.1`
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5191732Z   
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5191910Z   The issue should guide a coding agent to:
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5192282Z   1. Update the README with AVD-specific key concepts and code snippet placeholders
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5192925Z   2. Create `tests/Samples/Sample_DesktopVirtualizationOperations.cs` with `#region Snippet:` blocks for the 7 key operations
2026-04-10T05:45:25.5193704Z   3. Run `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 desktopvirtualization` to inject the snippets into the README
